title: Burrito Powered Coding...
summary: Better Stack explores free AI coding through a Chipotle loyalty-based workaround involving Claude, humorously questioning the legality of accessing paid AI development tools via promotional means.
writeup: Better Stack examines a Chipotle loyalty-based workaround for accessing Claude, framing it as a route to free AI coding tools that normally require payment. The video raises the question of whether obtaining paid AI development access through promotional means is legal. The takeaway is a look at AI-assisted coding paired with a humorous probe of the loophole's legitimacy.
